The configurations named Cakra (Discus), Dhanus (Bow),
&fhga{aka (Triangle), Danda (Staff), Pura (Town), PrUsa (Dart) and
Vajra (Thunderbolt), produce famine and drought in the country
and promote war among kings.
[Cf. ifpm—
"T cTc^^* ^ ll]
Note the particular direction of the sky in which a group of
planets is sighted at sunset. There will be another king and great.

Planetary Triangle XX 227
trouble from foreign armies in the country corresponding to that
quarter.
[This does not refer to the emergence of planets after eclipse,
but their sight in a group at sunset in a particular direction.]
When planets combine in any asterism, people ruled by that
asterism [vide XIP & XV supra) will be killed. But when they are
radiant and do not occult each other, they will prove beneficent to
the same people.
